provenance.reason: Upstream 02_SECTION_MAP not yet produced; lane synthesized section_ids locally from drop file. Station first pass was skipped in this round-1 sample (deterministic run requires extract.py); LLM refinement produced ClaimArch directly from the drop file.

claims.surface_claim: This checklist ensures aircraft, crew, instruments, fuel, communication systems, and safety controls are ready before flight.
claims.buried_claim: Flight safety depends on completing standardized checks before takeoff.
claims.operational_claim: Each checklist item must have a pass/fail state.

claims.surface_claim: The checklist must be completed in order. If any required item fails, takeoff must stop until the issue is corrected.
claims.buried_claim: A checklist is an ordered sequence whose validity depends on every prior step having passed.
claims.operational_claim: On any failed item, takeoff is blocked until the failed item is re-verified as passing.

claims.surface_claim: Authorize takeoff only after all checks pass.
claims.buried_claim: Takeoff authorization is conditional on full checklist completion.
claims.operational_claim: Takeoff authorization is a terminal step that gates on every preceding item.

claims.surface_claim: This checklist fails if pilots cannot determine whether a required safety item passed or failed.
claims.buried_claim: Checklist validity requires every required item to be decidable as pass or fail.
claims.operational_claim: Every required item must have an explicit pass/fail state before the checklist can be marked complete.

claims.surface_claim: Failure to complete this checklist could lead to aircraft malfunction, communication failure, or unsafe takeoff.
claims.buried_claim: Incomplete pre-flight verification raises operational risk in flight-critical systems.
claims.operational_claim: Risk is mitigated by completing every checklist item; risk pressure is measurable as the count of unverified items at takeoff.

calibration_expected.surface_claim_match: This checklist ensures aircraft, crew, instruments, fuel, communication systems, and safety controls are ready before flight.
calibration_expected.buried_claim_match: Flight safety depends on completing standardized checks before takeoff.
calibration_expected.operational_claim_match: Each checklist item must have a pass/fail state.

notes: Calibration article — no Theophysics claims, no Master Equation invocation, no Law_X claims.
operational_claim for sec_01 matches CALIBRATION_EXPECTED.md exactly.
When 02_SECTION_MAP lands, replace mocked section_ids and re-emit. ClaimArch shapes are stable.
